desc.en: yangzhou bay is a district in my imagination, which owns a large area of land with 7 cities. it is really a large project for me with 4600+ stations and 70+ up to now,but i trully enjoy the process during my creating.though it is still with mass of upset defects such as only one river marked on this work, no sea marked on this work , some stations which are not supposed to share the same name or translations in english which are not so proper.however, i really hope you can enjoy it( smile :) ❤)
desc.zh: 洋州湾这个东西我设想了很久，包括七座城市——青州，涟临，洋湾，银滨，西青，沧州和潮州；地图上还标注有的学府特区和核心区都是准地级区，约等于市。尽管这个作品并不是很完善，比如有很多水域（实在是标不出来了，太卡了）还有什么站点没翻译或者翻译不到位，又或者是一些站点重名了（原谅我吧我的狭小脑容量记不住这么多东西），但还是非常希望您能享受这个作品（享受在哪儿），谢谢浏览(-ɛ-)！

reference: 爱发电,Sat Jun 20 2026 23:51:46 GMT+0800 (中国标准时间)
